narrative:
21 Ohio Senate district has 261,781 registered voters, with 54.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 4.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 41.2%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 37.1 percentage points. Registration is trending redder in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +13.1% D−R vs +51.2% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
